entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation Plan compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String><?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory" trackingId="9e9a2629a2574ec3b15b8643261a39cd"> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="adm-EMP01481" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Set" value="adm-sailpoint.object.ProvisioningPlan$AttributeRequest@12f08021"/> <AttributeRequest name="givenName" op="Set" value="Aaron"/> <AttributeRequest name="sn" op="Set" value="Rivera"/> <AttributeRequest name="mail" op="Set" value="Aaron.Rivera@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Set" value="Mahesh@1045"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </String>
